metadata.comment: Reglas analiticas Sentinel del lab SOC (Proyecto 3). Tablas: SecurityEvent (Windows) y Event (Sysmon/PowerShell via AMA). Validar tras conectar la telemetria del lab.

properties.description: TGS hacia la cuenta senuelo svc_sql (cualquier cifrado) o con RC4 0x17. T1558.003.
properties.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4769 | where ServiceName !endswith '$' and ServiceName != 'krbtgt' | where ServiceName =~ 'svc_sql' or TicketEncryptionType == '0x17' | extend Reason = iff(ServiceName =~ 'svc_sql','Honeypot svc_sql','RC4 0x17')

properties.description: Script Block Logging con indicadores de loader (IEX, DownloadString, -enc...). T1059.001/T1027.
properties.query: Event | where Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell' and EventID == 4104 | where RenderedDescription has_any ('FromBase64String','Invoke-Expression','IEX','DownloadString','Net.WebClient','Invoke-WebRequest','-enc','-EncodedCommand')

properties.displayName: Manipulacion de Defender por linea de comandos (4688)
properties.description: Exclusiones o desactivacion de Defender via cmdline (Add-MpPreference, -ExclusionPath...). T1562.001.
properties.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4688 | where CommandLine has_any ('Add-MpPreference','Set-MpPreference','-ExclusionPath','-ExclusionProcess','-ExclusionExtension','-DisableRealtimeMonitoring','DisableBehaviorMonitoring')

properties.description: 4768 con PreAuthType=0 hacia cuentas de usuario (DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH). T1558.004.
properties.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4768 | where PreAuthType == '0' | where TargetUserName !endswith '$'

properties.description: Binarios del sistema usados para descargar carga util. T1105.
properties.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4688 | where (NewProcessName endswith '\\certutil.exe' and CommandLine has_any ('-urlcache','/urlcache','-verifyctl')) or (NewProcessName endswith '\\bitsadmin.exe' and CommandLine has '/transfer') or (NewProcessName endswith '\\mshta.exe' and CommandLine has_any ('http://','https://'))
